etymology.description: 子(子) (zǐ, "child") + 乑(乑) (yín, "together") = a group of carefree, lighthearted children playing together -> carefree, easygoing
etymology.interpretation: The character combines 子(子) (zǐ, "child") with 乑(乑) (yín, "together"), giving the image of children playing together uninhibitedly, capturing the essence of being carefree and easygoing.
